creator: deuerl@indra.de
text:
make world fails when starting to build libperl
	cvs-cur. as of today 17.05.99 11:30 GMZ

===> libperl
cc -m486 -O2 -pipe -fexpensive-optimizations -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl
/libperl -I/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5 -c /usr/s
rc/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c -o op.o
/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c: In function `P
erl_pad_leavemy':
/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c:390: `PL_comppa
d_n' undeclared (first use this function)
/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c:390: (Each unde
clared identifier is reported only once
/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c:390: for each f
unction it appears in.)
/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/libperl/../../../../contrib/perl5/op.c:390: parse erro
r before ``'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: 
	
	make world
